articles.title: Fatima Sana lands Hundred wildcard deal for Birmingham Phoenix
articles.description: Allrounder earns deal having impressed in defeat against South Africa in Women's T20 World Cup

articles.title: Sooryavanshi to have parents with him on tour of Ireland and England
articles.description: BCCI secretary said the decision would help the 15-year old cope with challenges on his maiden India tour

articles.title: Roberta Moretti, Brazil's trailblazing women's cricketer, retires from internationals
articles.description: "I feel the moment is right," the former Brazil captain and current board president said in an Instagram post

articles.title: BCCI mulls early start to IPL to minimise matches in extreme summer
articles.description: BCCI secretary Devajit Saikia has revealed plans to run the tournament from around March 10 to May 15 starting next year

articles.title: Glenn Phillips repels England to lead New Zealand recovery
articles.description: From 107 for 4, the visitors have pushed on to a better position at the end of the first day's play at The Oval

articles.title: Debutant Davies lives his dream on banner day for Australia's spinners
articles.description: Joel Davies took 3 for 17 as Australia's spinners sank Bangladesh in the first T20I in Chattogram

articles.title: Dercksen, Kapp help SA stumble past Pakistan, despite Sana heroics
articles.description: Fielding errors and poor running cost Pakistan dear, as De Klerk helps SA over the line

articles.title: Gill and Kishan hundreds carry India past 400 and to victory
articles.description: Afghanistan were bowled out for 232 with Gurnoor and Arshdeep picking up three-fors

articles.title: Shafali's all-round show helps India beat Netherlands
articles.description: India batter hits her first T20 World Cup fifty and backs it up with a three-for in Headingley

articles.title: Pakistan opt to bat, and play Javed and Tuba; SA unchanged
articles.description: Both teams enter the contest on the back of defeats in their respective opening matches of the T20 World Cup

articles.title: [Watch] Kumar Sangakkara plays village cricket wearing helmet gifted by Yashasvi Jaiswal
articles.description: Kumar Sangakkara has returned to playing village cricket in England. This is his third season, playing for his local team - Shillingstone Cricket Club.

articles.title: Stuart Broad picks only one Indian in his best Test playing XI
articles.description: Broad, who himself is a veteran of the modern-day era, with more than 600 wickets in Test cricket, is also regarded as one of the finest of his generation.

articles.title: ‘Board has no role in such matters’ - BCCI clears stance on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's controversy on Sri Lanka tour
articles.description: BCCI secretary Devajit Saikia has stated that the cricket-governing body will not penalise Vaibhav Sooryavanshi for his controversial behaviour during a match between India A and Sri Lanka A.

articles.title: MPL T20 2026: Match 36, JRL vs CG Match Prediction – Who will win today’s MPL T20 match between Jabalpur Royal Lions vs Chambal Ghariyals?
articles.description: The Ghariyals are currently the only side left in the tournament who have yet to suffer defeat.

articles.title: Brazilian cricketer Roberta Moretti retires from international cricket
articles.description: Moretti has played the most T20Is for Brazil, with 1278 runs and 33 wickets in 68 T20I appearances.

articles.title: Delhi-born Nikhil Chaudhary says he's more comfortable being Australian than Indian
articles.description: The stint in the BBL and playing domestic cricket for Australia nourished Chaudhary in such a way that he felt welcoming and valued in the set-up despite being an outsider.

articles.title: APL 2026: Match 15, BB vs VIJ Match Prediction – Who will win today’s APL match between Bhimavaram Bulls vs Vijayawada Sunshiners?
articles.description: BB will hope to do the double over their opponents after securing a three-wicket victory earlier this month.

articles.title: Vijaykumar Vyshak to lead Mysore Warriors squad at KSCA Maharaja Trophy T20 2026
articles.description: The Maharaja Trophy KSCA T20 tournament is scheduled to run from June 20 to July 12.

articles.title: BCCI allows Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s parents to accompany him on Ireland-England tour
articles.description: The two match T20 series will begin on June 26.

articles.title: 'Prepare him for failure' - Former RR coach Paddy Upton on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's meteoric rise
articles.description: The 15-year-old Sooryavanshi has taken the cricketing world by storm with a stellar season in the IPL, which has seen him become the youngest player to be called up to an India squad.
